demo_name: Governed Personal Assistant First Usable Demo
demo_goal: Compress the governed platform into one reviewable no-effect assistant demo before live connector or customer authority is claimed.

canonical_user_story.request: Review one invoice-related request and prepare a vendor email draft after policy and approval checks.
canonical_user_story.observable_result: The operator sees the interpreted request, policy result, blocked actions, approval requirement, draft/preview status, receipt refs, proof refs, and next safe action.

promotion_gates.required_before_promotion: Static packet validates and renders without raw private payloads.
Draft projection proves no connector mutation and no external send.
Approval packet exists while approval_is_execution remains false.
UAO admission, dry-run adapter evidence, redaction, rollback plan, and effect receipt schema exist.
Explicit operator approval, connector authority proof, signed effect receipt, rollback/recovery evidence, and terminal closure certificate exist.
Separate customer-readiness witness, support boundary, legal/business review, data boundary, and incident/recovery procedure exist.

constructive_deltas: Names one first usable demo instead of scattering product interpretation across many platform surfaces.
Separates deployment/public-health evidence from live assistant authority and customer readiness.
Defines a no-effect demo lane with visible operator outputs.
Adds validator-ready authority fields for future claim synchronization.
fracture_deltas: No live UI, connector call, Gmail mutation, payment call, memory write, deployment mutation, or customer-facing service is created by this packet.
README, plain-English overview, STATUS.md, and DEPLOYMENT_STATUS.md still need a later claim-synchronization pass.
The finance approval pilot and personal-assistant packet still need one shared walkthrough before live use can be considered.
next_safe_actions: Render this packet into a static operator page.
Bind this packet to the personal-assistant console read model.
Add a draft-only invoice/email walkthrough with no external effect.
Add an approval-review packet that proves approval is not execution.
Reconcile repository claim language across README, plain-English overview, STATUS.md, and DEPLOYMENT_STATUS.md.
